title: Philip's Biome Features
description: Mod that adds boulders, rocks, and features to Minecraft. Keeps vanilla biomes fresh with nature content.
body:
![Philip's Biome Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1c4c1c261b924a9753744dfccc0614207645097.png)
Minecraft Biomes is something that makes the game fun to play. Some could say that it lacks features. Philip’s Biome Features focuses on improving biomes that need nature designs. For every exploration decided you may discover small and large boulders to wood logs upon forest floors.


Many rocks spawns with different variants such like:
- Andesite
- Granite
- Calcite
- Diorite
- Black Stone
  
There are many other stone types you can think of.

For treasure hunters some may even find precious ores randomly generated within the rock.

This mod is a great addon to [Philip’s Ruins](https://modrinth.com/mod/philips-ruins)

[![Cubus Studio](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/569737/description_8226cee9-f32c-414b-8185-4dedbcfae151.png "Cubus Studio")](https://discord.gg/rxnBrcWP5R)
